# Elero bidirectional blinds/awning remote
# {N}<hex>
#
# Source: https://github.com/merbanan/rtl_433/issues/3083
#
# All 38 CRC-valid codes (out of 60 real captures the reporter posted --
# the other 22 are a few bits short, demod-truncated) covering all 4
# channel groupings (Ch1/Ch2/Ch3/All) and all 3 commands (Up/Stop/Down).
# Filename in each comment is the reporter's original capture, in case the
# underlying .cu8 is ever wanted (only one per command is kept as an
# actual fixture, see 01/-03/).

# Ch1 Up (g003_869.4M_2048k.cu8)
{367}555555555555555555555555a723a723c916b115d10845407256add4422708b6aad85bb6c78b9cd8ab22b31ac1b4
